programme.title: Schitt's Creek
programme.desc: Alexis plans a local premiere for the "Crows" movie, and Moira makes a big splash on the red carpet; David tends to Patrick after his wisdom teeth removal.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek
programme.desc: Alexis and Moira deal with the aftermath of a viral video, while Johnny helps Bob get back out in the dating world.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek
programme.desc: Moira and David sample wine at Herb Ertlinger's vineyard, while Johnny attempts to have "the talk" with Patrick.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek
programme.desc: Johnny and Moira spend a night at the presidential suite in the new motel, while Alexis receives a surprise visitor.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek
programme.desc: Johnny becomes overly involved in Alexis' romantic life, while Moira offends the townspeople in an interview with People Magazine.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek
programme.desc: Moira's former "Sunrise Bay" producers show up with big news while Alexis binge-watches old episodes of the soap.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek
programme.desc: The Roses attend the "Escape Room" portion of David and Patrick's Bachelor Party, but their participation wanes the more their personal dilemmas come to a head.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek
programme.desc: Johnny, Stevie and Roland head to New York for their pitch meeting, and the family anxiously awaits their return.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek
programme.desc: Moira receives some unexpected news, and David makes a tough decision about where he wants to live.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek
programme.desc: David stresses out over the rain on his wedding day, but his family makes it right.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek
programme.desc: David agrees to play in the annual baseball game; Moira's rehearsal pushes Stevie over the edge.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek
programme.desc: Johnny and Moira accidentally hit a cat; David has a run-in with an old colleague who has a business very similar to Rose Apothecary.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek
programme.desc: While in town for the surprise party, Patrick's parents get a surprise of their own; Moira gets coaxed into going to a soap opera convention with Alexis.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek
programme.desc: Johnny fills in at the annual mayor's roast; David tries to stop Moira from finding out about Stevie and Patrick's dance lessons.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek
programme.desc: Patrick and David go on a romantic hike; everyone panics over Johnny's health scare.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek
programme.desc: Stevie is nowhere to be found on opening night for Cabaret; David attempts to make a big announcement.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek
programme.desc: David scouts a potential wedding venue, while Johnny and Moira have a romantic picnic by the creek.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek
programme.desc: David is embarrassed by a childhood issue that resurfaces, and only spirals further when Patrick is so understanding; Johnny, Stevie and Roland attend a viewing for a nearby motel; Alexis helps Moira join social media.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek
programme.desc: Johnny and Moira meet with a key demographic; Alexis struggles with her new job; David offers emotional support to his boss' daughter.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek
programme.desc: Johnny and Moira have to deal with a surprise motel guest; Alexis and David go apartment hunting.

programme.title: Due South
programme.desc: Kowalski, Welsh and Thatcher (Callum Keith Rennie, Beau Starr, Camilla Scott) all witness a murder at the mall, but can't agree on who did it.

programme.title: Mr. D
programme.desc: Gerry decides to form a teachers union at Xavier; Malik bails on his janitorial duties; Lisa has a crush on Trudy's brother.

programme.title: Mr. D
programme.desc: Gerry is forced into covering Saturday detention; Robert and Lisa have a heart to heart.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek
programme.desc: Johnny and Moira meet with a key demographic; Alexis struggles with her new job; David offers emotional support to his boss' daughter.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek
programme.desc: Johnny and Moira have to deal with a surprise motel guest; Alexis and David go apartment hunting.

programme.desc: Johnny and Moira meet with a key demographic; Alexis struggles with her new job; David offers emotional support to his boss' daughter.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek
programme.desc: Johnny and Moira have to deal with a surprise motel guest; Alexis and David go apartment hunting.

programme.title: Fresh Off the Boat
programme.desc: After learning that Tiger Woods is half Thai, Louis and Jessica are inspired to make Eddie and Evan the next great Asian golf prodigies.

programme.title: American Housewife
programme.desc: Katie must balance her home life and work life when she goes back to work as a party planner.

programme.title: Wings
programme.desc: Helen tries to dissuade Roy's Russian mail-order bride (Natasha Pavlova) from marriage.

programme.title: Wings
programme.desc: Joe and Helen crash a wedding reception to get ideas for their own nuptials.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Becker must sort out his feelings for two different women; Linda's antics leave Margaret at her wits' end.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Jake and Bob want to join Reggie in Europe; Chris isn't convinced when Becker tries to prove his true feelings toward her.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: Hawkeye, B.J. and their medical cohorts find a new way to escape the depressive atmosphere of the war.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: A clumsy soldier lifts the 4077th's spirits, but Col. Potter remains down in the dumps.

programme.title: The Neighborhood
programme.desc: Calvin and Tina near a milestone anniversary; Dave and Gemma decide to help the Butlers have the wedding they missed out on the first time around; Malcolm and Marty prepare an unforgettable performance for their parents' special occasion.

programme.title: The Neighborhood
programme.desc: Calvin and Dave team up for a chance at bowling championship glory; Gemma and Tina face off against each other for the top ranking in an arcade game.

programme.title: Rules of Engagement
programme.desc: When Russell finds out that Audrey's sister, Barbara, is having problems in her marriage, he takes her out, which infuriates Audrey.

programme.title: Rules of Engagement
programme.desc: Jeff teaches Audrey the meaning of the guy code when he asks her to keep some information to herself.

programme.desc: After learning that Tiger Woods is half Thai, Louis and Jessica are inspired to make Eddie and Evan the next great Asian golf prodigies.

programme.desc: Katie must balance her home life and work life when she goes back to work as a party planner.

programme.desc: Employees take some big gambles when they host a charity casino-night in their warehouse.

programme.title: The Office
programme.desc: Michael unintentionally outs a gay employee; the situation with Jim and Pam.

programme.title: Mom
programme.desc: Bonnie gets cold feet when considering her future with Adam; Christy risks failing a test to help a fellow alcoholic.

programme.title: Mom
programme.desc: Bonnie is suspicious when her brother returns from rehab and befriends Adam; Christy and Bonnie have a brush with the law when they take Ray's fancy car for a joy ride.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek
programme.desc: Moira's campaign takes a turn when some of her lawn signs mysteriously disappear; David and Alexis must work together to get David's boss out of legal trouble.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek
programme.desc: Johnny and Moira see a couple they knew in a past life; Alexis and David go to Mutt's annual barn party.

programme.title: Due South
programme.desc: When Fraser's friend intercepts a secret message, Fraser and Kowalski become entrapped in a deadly arms transaction.

programme.title: Mr. D
programme.desc: Gerry is assigned to help Ricki prepare for a fencing tournament; Bobbi invites Dwyer over for dinner in an attempt to seduce him.

programme.desc: Gerry is confronted by his overprotective and obnoxious mother; Bobbi tries to pawn off the role of staff punching bag; Ricki sells pencils to Robert.

programme.desc: Jessica is happy to learn of Evan's interest in joining the debate team; Eddie and Emery team up to enter a comic book contest.

programme.title: American Housewife
programme.desc: With her new job taking up more of her time, Katie and Greg try to split up parenting duties; Katie tries to keep some distance between Taylor and her boyfriend; Greg tries to convince Oliver to be honest after overhearing Oliver lie to his friends.

programme.title: Wings
programme.desc: An upcoming high-school reunion presents unique opportunities for Helen, Lowell and Brian.

programme.title: Wings
programme.desc: While Joe awaits the results of a paternity test, Helen gets ready to celebrate a romantic Valentine's Day.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Tensions between Becker and Chris escalate, threatening their friendship.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Becker makes a long-distance visit to a former patient (Hal Holbrook) who's on his deathbed; Chris gives Bob a peep show.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: A congressional aide on a fact-finding tour visits the 4077th.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: Hawkeye wants to heal a wounded Korean woman whom an ROK officer wants to question.

programme.title: The Neighborhood
programme.desc: When Gemma sets a reluctant Malcolm up on a blind date with a teacher at her school, she discovers new details about the origins of her relationship with Dave; Marty helps Calvin and Tina plan for their future.

programme.title: The Neighborhood
programme.desc: Calvin reluctantly agrees to let Marty create a website for his auto shop in hopes of drumming up more business; Dave makes it his mission to prove to his son that there's more to life than his favorite gadgets.

programme.desc: Jeff urges Audrey to be more creative in the bedroom so he will have better stories to share with Russell and Adam.

programme.title: The Office
programme.desc: Michael organizes a party in his hotel room when he, Dwight and Jan attend the Northeastern Mid-Market Office Supply Convention in Philadelphia.
